text.title: Testing Patterns (Cross-Language) Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply testing-patterns. Each step names its input, action, and output. Steps may not be reordered without explicit deviation note.

step.name: Inventory existing tests by layer (unit / integration / E2E) and runtime.
step.description: Input: test files + CI logs. Action: Count and time per layer.. Output: audit table.
step.note: Step 1. Required input: test files + CI logs.

step.name: Compare to the pyramid target; identify the most-inverted layer.
step.description: Input: audit table. Action: Compute deviations.. Output: gap analysis.

step.name: Pick the data pattern per layer (inline / builder / object mother).
step.description: Input: duplicated input blocks. Action: Apply rule r3.. Output: data-pattern decision.
step.note: Step 3. Required input: duplicated input blocks.

step.name: Write a 1-page strategy rubric covering AAA, pyramid target, data pattern, UI pattern, isolation policy.
step.description: Input: decisions above. Action: Author rubric.. Output: strategy.md.

step.name: Open code-review checklist items mapping the rubric to PR reviews.
step.description: Input: strategy.md. Action: Add to PR template.. Output: PR checklist.
